name: layout/settings-layout
description: Two-column settings page layout with a fixed-width menu and fluid content area.

meta.name: SettingsLayout
meta.description: Two-column settings page layout with a fixed-width menu and fluid content area.

whenToUse: A two-column settings page with a fixed-width menu and fluid content
Account, preferences, or admin pages with sectioned navigation
whenNotToUse: A general resizable two-pane layout — use SplitView
A full app frame — use AppShell or SidebarApp

related.name: SettingsFormPage
related.reason: The settings form block composes this layout

related.name: SplitView
related.reason: Use when the two panes should be user-resizable

intent.a11yRationale: Provides a navigation region for the menu and a main region for content.
